name: Hephaestus
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Hephaestus embodies forge, craft, volcano — under Vulcan/Mars; in Capricorn, Aries.

related.name: Vulcan
related.teaser: Vulcan embodies forge, craft, volcano — under Vulcan/Mars; in Capricorn, Aries.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ♂ Mars
related.teaser: Mars is the blade of fire — spear of will, tower’s flame, the storm of courage.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Hestia
related.teaser: Hestia embodies hearth, home, sacred flame — under Vesta/Moon; in Cancer, Virgo.

related.name: Indra
related.teaser: Indra embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Perkūnas
related.teaser: Perkūnas embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: Perun
related.teaser: Perun embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Raijin
related.teaser: Raijin embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Thor
related.teaser: Thor embodies storms, thunder, protection — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Vesta
related.teaser: Vesta embodies hearth, home, sacred flame — under Vesta/Moon; in Cancer, Virgo.
